cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/datekit/__init__.py b/datekit/__init__.py
index 422f6f7..957e503 100644
--- a/datekit/__init__.py
+++ b/datekit/__init__.py
@@ -5,3 +5,11 @@ from datetime import date, timedelta
 
 def add_days(d, n):
     return d + timedelta(days=n)
+
+def add_months(d, n):
+    import calendar
+    m = d.month - 1 + n
+    year = d.year + m // 12
+    month = m % 12 + 1
+    day = min(d.day, calendar.monthrange(year, month)[1])
+    return date(year, month, day)

cases.name: naive_replace
cases.diff:
diff --git a/datekit/__init__.py b/datekit/__init__.py
index 422f6f7..8311ea5 100644
--- a/datekit/__init__.py
+++ b/datekit/__init__.py
@@ -5,3 +5,7 @@ from datetime import date, timedelta
 
 def add_days(d, n):
     return d + timedelta(days=n)
+
+def add_months(d, n):
+    m = d.month - 1 + n
+    return d.replace(year=d.year + m // 12, month=m % 12 + 1)

cases.name: timedelta_30
cases.diff:
diff --git a/datekit/__init__.py b/datekit/__init__.py
index 422f6f7..3175fee 100644
--- a/datekit/__init__.py
+++ b/datekit/__init__.py
@@ -5,3 +5,6 @@ from datetime import date, timedelta
 
 def add_days(d, n):
     return d + timedelta(days=n)
+
+def add_months(d, n):
+    return d + timedelta(days=30 * n)
